response.overview: An avant-garde short that opens on a series of full-frontal closeups of a woman’s pubic hair. As the camera pulls out, we realise that the woman is, in fact, one of two models. Both of whom are lying nude on the floor as an artist paints multiple triangles and various geometrical shapes on their naked forms. He then draws two lines, from the women and all the way up the wall, thereby making them the base of an even bigger triangle, next to which he writes the following sentence: ‘the writing is on the wall’.
response.title: The Triangle
